name: heavy_hand_tick
description: Heavy Hand adds +1 to every Poison application: with Heavy Hand out, Tinge applies 3 (not 2) Poison to a single normalized 20-HP enemy (Tinge deals 3 -> 17), confirmed via 3 tick damage after end of turn (-> 14)

checks.note: Tinge 2 + Heavy Hand 1 = 3 poison; ticks 3 at enemy turn end (17 -> 14)
